function.message: Processed the oldest inbox request by OCR-normalizing the four specified finance records into YAML frontmatter and then deleting the completed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, root AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read inbox and OCR/migration workflows plus finance schema, treated inbox as request not canonical truth, preserved original note bodies, kept edits focused, and deleted the inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to run four finance notes through the OCR workflow. The workflow docs defined OCR here as extracting visible data from the existing note text into YAML frontmatter, and the finance schema specified the required invoice and bill fields. Each of the four target finance notes visibly contained all required fields and line items, so I added matching frontmatter without inventing data, preserved each original body, and then removed the inbox item as directed by the inbox-processing workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: write frontmatter to four target finance records
